meta.scenario: deep house A to B diagonal Camelot, 11.7 BPM gap, T2 enters mid-track at bar 40
meta.source: Kerri Chandler b2b Jeremy Underground @ Boiler Room 2016-08-18

transition_arc: Large BPM jump (11.7 BPM, ~10%) with A to B diagonal Camelot move. T2 is a classic soul track — DJ enters at T2 mid-track groove section (from_bar=40) intentionally skipping the slow build. The 9A to 10B move (F minor to D major) is borderline — requires careful harmonic stem management. Entering T2 at full groove energy masks the BPM stretch.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 8: first groove bar after 8-bar intro, kick+bass+soulful pads, RMS 0.42
T1 bar 72 (play bar 64 + from_bar 8): mid-groove, drums=0.55, rms=0.42, harmonic=0.45
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 40: established mid-track groove, kick+bass+strings, RMS 0.55
annotated_actions.why: T1 at steady groove. T2 at bar 40 already in full groove body (skipping its 40-bar intro build). Large BPM stretch (11.7) is hidden by T2 entering at full energy — listener ear snaps to T2 groove immediately.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 40: full strings + kick active (drums=0.7), bass=0.55 but held at 0 via stem
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=40 is mid-track groove — drums already at full energy. other:0.6 brings in T2 strings (10B), which are slightly dissonant with 9A — keep duration short (16 bars) to minimize harmonic overlap.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 48 (from_bar=40 + 8): T2 bass was held via stem and is now being released
annotated_actions.why: T1 bass diminishing. T2 bass held via stem. Swap transfers bass. At the swap moment T2 full bass comes in — high-impact moment of the blend.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 56: full soul groove, organ+bass+strings+kick, RMS 0.60
annotated_actions.why: T2 full mix from bar 56 — well into established groove. Large BPM transition complete.
